x-enumeration-literals.name: Receivables Evaluation
x-enumeration-literals.description: A workstep to assess the status of the expected account payment and define receivable schedule

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Negotiation
x-enumeration-literals.description: A workstep to contact the customer and request/chase payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: A workstep to respond to (notification of) payments received on the account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Resolution
x-enumeration-literals.description: A workstep to resolve accounts receivable status - for example either settled or written down/sent for recovery handling.
